    WHEN `t0`.`createdAt` >= @__sevenDaysAgo_2 THEN COALESCE(`t0`.`amount`, 0.0)
END), 0.0) AS `RevWeekly`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE
    WHEN `t0`.`createdAt` >= @__startOfMonth_3 THEN COALESCE(`t0`.`amount`, 0.0)
END), 0.0) AS `RevMonthly`, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(`t0`.`amount`, 0.0)), 0.0) AS `RevTotal`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`amount`, `t`.`createdAt`, 1 AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`Key`
LIMIT 1

    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`

) AS `t0`

SELECT DISTINCT `u0`.`staffInput`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`staffInput`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND ((`t`.`createdAt` >= @__start_0) AND (`t`.`createdAt` < @__end_1))
    UNION
    SELECT `t0`.`staffReceive` AS `staffInput`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t0`
    WHERE ((`t0`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t0`.`isDeleted`)) AND ((`t0`.`createdAt` >= @__start_0) AND (`t0`.`createdAt` < @__end_1))
    UNION
    SELECT `t1`.`staffCreated` AS `staffInput`
    FROM `tblTrips` AS `t1`
    WHERE (`t1`.`createdAt` >= @__start_0) AND (`t1`.`createdAt` < @__end_1)
) AS `u0`
WHERE `u0`.`staffInput` IS NOT NULL

    WHERE ((`t`.`startTime` >= @__start_0) AND (`t0`.`stationID` = @__stationId_Value_1)) AND ((`t`.`staffID` LIKE @__searchStaff_2_contains) OR (`t0`.`fullName` LIKE @__searchStaff_2_contains_1))
    ORDER BY `t`.`startTime` DESC
    LIMIT @__p_3
) AS `s`
LEFT JOIN `tblStations` AS `t1` ON `s`.`stationID` = `t1`.`stationID`
ORDER BY `s`.`startTime` DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE
    WHEN (`t0`.`createdAt` >= @__selectedDate_1) AND (`t0`.`createdAt` < @__tomorrow_2) THEN COALESCE(`t0`.`amount`, 0.0)
END), 0.0) AS `RevDate`, COUNT(CASE
    WHEN (`t0`.`createdAt` >= @__selectedDate_1) AND (`t0`.`createdAt` < @__tomorrow_2) THEN 1
END) AS `OrderDate`, COUNT(*) AS `TotalCount`, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(`t0`.`amount`, 0.0)), 0.0) AS `TotalRev`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`amount`, `t`.`createdAt`, 1 AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND ((`t`.`staffInput` = @__userId_0) AND ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)))

) AS `t0`

FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTripId`

) AS `t0`

SELECT `t0`.`shipStatus` AS `Status`, `t0`.`HasTripId` AS `HasTrip`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTripId`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTripId`
